data.title: Monolithic Architecture
data.description: Google's core search architecture is designed as a monolith with tightly integrated components.
data.technical_spec: Single logical executable, centralized code-base, tightly coupled components.

data.title: Distributed Data Centers
data.description: Utilizes globally distributed data centers to provide high availability and low latency.
data.technical_spec: Multiple geographically distributed locations with redundant services.

data.title: In-House Databases
data.description: Custom-built databases like BigTable and Spanner for robust data handling and real-time processing.
data.technical_spec: Scalable distributed databases, strong consistency models.

data.title: Microservices Transition
data.description: Gradual evolution towards microservices and containerization where appropriate.

data.title: Load Balancing Innovations
data.description: Advanced load balancing techniques for efficient traffic distribution.
